hero.title: Frontend Developer
hero.bio: I'm Alejandro, a full-stack JavaScript engineer from Santiago, Chile. With 10+ years in web development, I've designed and implemented modern solutions across the full stack for diverse clients—from early-stage startups to established companies. I'm passionate about building performant, scalable applications.

about.heading: My favorite stacks
about.description: I have huge experience working with <1>Angular, React, VueJS and NodeJS</1>. And I love taking care of <3>UI / UX design</3>, look and feel, user interaction and responsive behaviour.
about.design_tools: Some of my favorite design tools are Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, Xperience Design and others.
about.learning_sub: These are some frameworks / libs I like to keep studying everyday.

contact_bar.heading: Do you have a new project idea?
contact_bar.sub: I could help you make it true.
